name: Baked Chicken Breasts
recipeIngredient: 1 10.75 oz can cream of chicken soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken breasts and pat them dry. Place them in a Crock-Pot.
2. Combine the remaining ingredients in a bowl and pour over the chicken breasts.
3. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours or on High for 4 to 5 hours.
Serves 4 to 6
